ToolTreaux Deluxe Hobby Craft DIY Vinyl Cutting Kit with Self Healing Mat Clamps

Cut and shape vinyl like a pro with the Deluxe Vinyl Cutting Tool Kit!

This kit comes with everything you need to craft with vinyl: a self healing cutting board, assorted precision hobby blades, scissors, clamps, tweezers and a hook and pick set.

Key Features

  • Self Healing Mat: 18" x 12" | Gridlines & Measurement References
  • Hobby Knife Set: 3 Precision Knives with Assorted Blades Sizes for Any Project
  • Pick & Hook Set: Soft Grip Handles with Assorted Tips
  • Assorted Tweezers for Holding Vinyl/Cleaning Up
  • Clamps for Holding Vinyl Down

Product Specifications

  • MPN: VCHK-1
  • UPC: 729676787465
  • Size: 18 in x 12 in

The self-healing mat measures 18" x 12" and comes with handy grid-lines for exact measurements. We've included clamps to hold your vinyl down while you work, and the scissors will assist you in cutting larger pieces.

Additionally we've included a 4 piece hook and pick set as well as 5 assorted tweezers for added accuracy and easy clean up. Make sure to grab this set before your next vinyl cutting project!

16pc Hobby Knife Set Includes: *(1) Precision Knife w/ 3/8" Chuck & Plastic Grip Handle *(1) Precision Knife w/ 3/8" Chuck & Metal Handle *(1) Precision Knife w/ 1/4" Chuck & Metal Handle *(2) #2 Blades *(1) #7 Blade *(1) #10 Blade *(3) #11 Blades *(1) #12 Blade *(1) #17 Blade *(1) #19 Blade *(1) #20 Blade *(1) #21 Blade *(1) #22 Blade

4pc Pick & Hook Set Includes: *(1) Straight Pick *(1) 30 Degree Hook *(1) Hook *(1) 90 Degree Hook
